creator: sho@sfc.wide.ad.jp
text:
Our SCSI device on FreeBSD 7.0 is crushed when we use tape drive
on the SCSI card on bacula.

How-To-Repeat: Only when restoring from tape, it is occurred.
There is no problem when doing backup.
